entry.title: New IDC 80ARC018D0010 awarded to INUTEQ, LLC for the amount of $0

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THE NASA ADVANCED COMPUTING SERVICES CONTRACT SUPPORTS THE NASA ADVANCED SUPERCOMPUTING (NAS) DIVISION AT AMES RESEARCH CENTER (ARC) AND THE NASA CENTER FOR CLIMATE SIMULATION (NCCS) AT GODDARD SPACE FLIGHT CENTER (GSFC) AND PROVIDES ADVANCED COMPUTING SERVICES TO OTHER NASA CENTERS AND JET PROPULSION LABORATORY. NACS USES PROCUREMENTS TO SUPPORT OPERATIONAL HPC CAPABILITIES AND ALSO INCLUDES SERVICES FOR HIGH-END APPLICATIONS, DATA-INTENSIVE COMPUTING, COLLABORATIVE COMPUTING, AND EMERGING COMPUTING PARADIGMS.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: YES - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS USED.

ns1:productOrServiceCode.description: IT AND TELECOM- FACILITY OPERATION AND MAINTENANCE
